prompt: Professional vehicle wrap mockup for 'LK Design and Build', a premium Adelaide home renovation company. A modern white Toyota HiLux ute parked at an angle on a clean residential street in an upscale Adelaide suburb. The vehicle features a sophisticated partial wrap design: the doors display a large 'LK' monogram in matte charcoal with gold accent, 'DESIGN AND BUILD' in clean uppercase beneath it, and contact details '0401 061 246 | lyda@lkdesignandbuild.com.au' in small text. The tailgate has the full LK logo. The wrap uses a matte charcoal, white, and gold (#C9A96E) color scheme — premium and understated, not garish. Clean geometric design elements. The ute is parked near a modern renovated home showing the company's work quality. Photographed at 3/4 front angle, 35mm lens, f/4.0, ISO 200, overcast soft daylight providing even lighting. The vehicle is clean and the wrap looks freshly applied. Slight reflections visible on the vehicle's white panels.
negative_prompt: blurry, low resolution, cheap wrap, garish colors, neon, cartoon, damaged vehicle, dirty, old truck, unrealistic, bad perspective, text errors
